'''dhazara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylidine|xylidine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylidine|xylidine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhazara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzæræth|dhæzæræth]] || [[word:dhæzæræj|dhæzæræj]] || [[word:dhæzæræsh|dhæzæræsh]] || [[word:dhæzæræ|dhæzæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazazarath|dhazazarath]] || [[word:dhazazaraj|dhazazaraj]] || [[word:dhazazarash|dhazazarash]] || [[word:dhazazara|dhazazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazarath|dhazarath]] || [[word:dhazaraj|dhazaraj]] || [[word:dhazarash|dhazarash]] || [[word:dhazara|dhazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazafrath|dhazafrath]] || [[word:dhazafraj|dhazafraj]] || [[word:dhazafrash|dhazafrash]] || [[word:dhazafraf|dhazafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazaratha|dhazaratha]] || [[word:dhazaraja|dhazaraja]] || [[word:dhazarasha|dhazarasha]] || [[word:dhazaraka|dhazaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazarath|dhazarath]] || [[word:dhazaraj|dhazaraj]] || [[word:dhazarash|dhazarash]] || [[word:dhazara|dhazara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazarathal|dhazarathal]] || [[word:dhazarajal|dhazarajal]] || [[word:dhazarashal|dhazarashal]] || [[word:dhazarakal|dhazarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazarathatha|dhazarathatha]] || [[word:dhazarajaja|dhazarajaja]] || [[word:dhazarashasha|dhazarashasha]] || [[word:dhazaraka|dhazaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazarathan|dhazarathan]] || [[word:dhazarajan|dhazarajan]] || [[word:dhazarashan|dhazarashan]] || [[word:dhazarakan|dhazarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazarathaoro|dhazarathaoro]] || [[word:dhazarajaoro|dhazarajaoro]] || [[word:dhazarashaoro|dhazarashaoro]] || [[word:dhazarakaoro|dhazarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
